title: velocit.ee engines.json
description: Single source of truth for engine status, version, and descriptive copy. Both the velocit-ee/core README/CHANGELOG/per-engine READMEs and the velocit-ee/.github profile README regenerate from this file via tools/render_engine_status.py.

schema_version.description: Increment on incompatible changes to the file format.

shared.description: Stable cross-engine facts referenced by templates.

library.description: Name of the shared Python library packaging cross-engine code (currently 'velocitee-shared').

version.description: Current released version of the shared library.

engines.description: Engines listed in pipeline order (VME → VNE → VSE → VLE). Order is significant: tables and pipeline diagrams render in this sequence.

name.description: Human name, e.g. 'velocitee metal provisioning engine'.

status.description: Two-state model. 'Stable' = engine implements its declared scope and is usable. 'Planned' = no implementation yet.

version.description: Current released version. Empty string '0.0.0' for engines with no implementation yet.

short.description: Description for the engine table row. One sentence, fits on one row of a 120-col terminal.

long.description: One- or two-paragraph description suitable for marketing surfaces. Markdown allowed.

backends.description: Optional: per-engine selectable backends listed in priority order.
